chapter_title.ar: باب فِيهِ نُتَفٌ وَ جَوَامِعُ مِنَ الرِّوَايَةِ فِي الْوَلَايَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 109 – In it are pointers and the concise from the reports regarding the Wilayah

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالسابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (164/ 5)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالسابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (164/ 5)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ وَ اللَّهِ إِنَّ فِي السَّمَاءِ لَسَبْعِينَ صَفّاً مِنَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ لَوِ اجْتَمَعَ أَهْلُ الْأَرْضِ كُلُّهُمْ يُحْصُونَ عَدَدَ كُلِّ صَفٍّ مِنْهُمْ مَا أَحْصَوْهُمْ وَ إِنَّهُمْ لَيَدِينُونَ بِوَلَايَتِنَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Ismail Bin Bazie, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl, from Abu Al Sabah Al Kinany,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I heard him<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘By Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! In the sky there are seventy rows of Angels. If the inhabitants of the earth, all of them were to gather together to count the number of each row of them, they would not be (able to) count them, and they are (all) having a Religion with our<sup>asws</sup> Wilayah’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Mahbub from Muhammad ibn al-Fudayl from abu al-Hassan (a.s.) who has said the following. “Wilaya of Ali (a.s.) (Leadership with Divine Authority) is written in all the lines of the prophets. Allah never sent any of His messengers who would not acknowledge the prophet-hood Muhammad (s.a) and Ali (a.s.) as the executor of his will.”
